# rasuvaeff/yii3-outbox-webhooks-bridge

Bridges yii3-outbox and yii3-webhooks for durable at-least-once webhook delivery.

## Install

```bash
composer require rasuvaeff/yii3-outbox-webhooks-bridge
```

## Rules

- `OutboxWebhookPublisher` implements `PublisherInterface` from `yii3-outbox`.
- Each `OutboxMessage` is converted to `WebhookEvent` (id/type/payload/createdAt mapped 1:1).
- Endpoints are resolved per message type via `WebhookEndpointProvider`.
- Dispatcher failure or `Failed` delivery status → `PublishException` → outbox retries.
- No endpoints for a type → silent success (zero deliveries).
- Fanout is all-or-nothing: any failure throws; receivers must be idempotent on event id.
- No DI config provided — app wires `OutboxWebhookPublisher` to `Processor`.

## API

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3OutboxWebhooksBridge\ConfigWebhookEndpointProvider;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3OutboxWebhooksBridge\OutboxWebhookPublisher;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Webhooks\WebhookEndpoint;

// Static endpoint config
$endpointProvider = new ConfigWebhookEndpointProvider(map: [
    'order.created' => [new WebhookEndpoint(url: 'https://example.com/hook', secret: 'secret')],
]);

// Publisher (inject your WebhookDispatcher + WebhookDeliveryStorage)
$publisher = new OutboxWebhookPublisher(
    dispatcher: $dispatcher,
    endpointProvider: $endpointProvider,
    deliveryStorage: $deliveryStorage,
);

// Custom endpoint provider
class DbEndpointProvider implements WebhookEndpointProvider {
    public function getEndpointsForType(string $type): array { /* DB lookup */ }
}
```
